title: euphrasia nemorosa subsp. occidentalis
intro: Euphrasia nemorosa subsp. occidentalis, also known as Western Woodland Eyebright, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Orobanchaceae. It is a perennial herb used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which help to soothe and protect the eyes, as well as treat respiratory issues such as colds and bronchitis. The health benefits of Euphrasia nemorosa subsp. occidentalis include its ability to reduce eye inflammation, improve vision, and boost the immune system, making it a popular natural remedy for various health conditions. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to treat a range of health issues, including eye problems, respiratory infections, and digestive issues.
